body.title: [dependency] There is always a domain: nothing reaches the inference proxy except through one
body.description:
Akien 2026-07-08: 'The default IS the general domain. So there is always a domain. And everybody else descends from that.'

CONSEQUENCE: escalation is currently a DS-ONLY privilege. VERIFIED — these call InferenceDevice().dispatch directly, bypassing any domain, and therefore get ZERO escalation: evaluator/core.py, evaluator/device.py, intent/device.py, reader/device.py, reader/node_extractor.py, summarizer/device.py, scraps/scraps_device.py, librarian/research.py, igor/cognition/inference_gateway.py, dicksimnel/device.py. (21 files across devices touch InferenceDevice at all.)

Under 'there is always a domain', each of these inherits the DEFAULT escalation ladder by descent instead of hand-rolling nothing. The proxy is a REPORTER (routes, dispatches, returns a typed result, never escalates); the DOMAIN is the DECIDER (owns the policy; the GENERAL domain owns the default).

ALSO: the general domain's default attempt is currently a full AgenticLoop (BaseDomain._run_attempt) — which is why the loop looked domain-universal. The general attempt must be ONE DISPATCH (that IS the chat agent). And rename BaseDomain -> GeneralDomain: it is concrete and instantiable, it IS the default, and 'Base' hides that.

GATED on T-domains-global-package + T-inference-escalation-policy-object.

**Affected files:** the 10 direct-dispatch callers above; domains/base.py; capabilities/base.py

**Scope boundary:** do not change what each caller ASKS for (tier/domain/urgency); only route it through a domain so it inherits the default ladder.

**Completion criteria:** an import/callgraph guard proves no device calls InferenceDevice.dispatch outside a domain; the general domain's attempt is a single dispatch, not a loop.

**Test plan:** red->green — a guard test asserts no module outside the domain layer calls InferenceDevice.dispatch; and a generalist (domain='') request escalates one rung on a capability signal without any device hand-rolling a walk.

**Decision:** decision:D-domains-general-with-device-owned-specializations-2026-07-08

[hard_block] Log every state change and every interface crossing. State changes: ticket status — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)

[error] No live keys or passwords in source. `.env` is gitignored. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)

[error] device.py and shim.py are the design center. Every component inherits from — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] bus/ owns comms:// routing. Nothing outside bus/ speaks to IMAP directly. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] skeleton/ owns the MCP aggregator and flat-file registry. No Postgres dependency. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] devices/ contains one subdirectory per device; each is independently deployable. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] `~/.unseen_university/logs/<device>/<stream>/` is the canonical log hierarchy — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] Every ticket closes proven, or declares itself unproven — no discriminator. A ticket that — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
…and 39 more (lower-severity or capped) — query constraints_get for the full set
